description: Display details about the NexusForge project
output:
Project: NexusForge
Description: Decentralized blockchain escrow platform governed by a lightweight DAO structure.
Tech: Wagmi, Chainlink VRF, IPFS, Firebase
Impact: Secures transactions through multi-signature escrow and verifiable randomness

Frontend: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
Backend: Node.js, FastAPI, MongoDB
AI/ML: Python, XGBoost
Blockchain: Solidity, Wagmi
Tools: Git, Docker

description: Open GitHub profile in a new tab
Open LinkedIn profile in a new tab

output:
Available commands:
  whoami         Reveal the identity of the developer
  ls projects    List all projects
  cat <project>  Display details about a project (e.g. cat arbitrage)
  cat skills     Display categorized skill sets
  open github    Open GitHub profile in a new tab
  open linkedin  Open LinkedIn profile in a new tab
  resume         Download the PDF resume
  clear          Clear the screen
  exit           Close the terminal
  matrix         Enter the matrix (Easter Egg)
